title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 1: Arjuna's Despair
description: Chapter 1 of the Bhagavad Gita: Arjuna surveys the battlefield and is overcome with grief at the prospect of killing his own kinsmen.
introduction: Chapter 1 of the Bhagavad Gita: Arjuna surveys the battlefield and is overcome with grief at the prospect of killing his own kinsmen.

translation.text: Arjuna said: 'Seeing my own kinsmen arrayed for battle, my limbs give way, my mouth dries up, my body trembles, and my hair stands on end.'
